svg.text: kubectl logs → kubectl describe → kubectl get events
User opens browser → enters namespace → clicks SCAN
Browser sends HTTP POST to Langflow /api/v1/run/<flow-id> with prompt
Tool Calling Agent receives prompt, calls analyze_pods tool with namespace
Custom component runs kubectl get pods → logs → describe → events via subprocess
kubectl reads ~/.kube/config → authenticates to cluster API server
Raw kubectl stdout returned to agent → LLM generates per-pod RCA + Fix
Agent response → Chat Output → JSON returned to browser
Browser parses response → renders pods, logs, describe, events, RCA, Fix in tabs
